non_commitments.text: Cam mocking up an AI search experience

non_commitments.text: Bea pulling support ticket data on report builder

Cam floated the idea, said 'I don't know if it's a Q4 thing'. Aiden replied 'probably not but also maybe'. No commitment.

non_commitments.text: Aiden writing up a Q4 list
